name: Lush Notebook
description: A handy Lush-branded notebook, perfect for jotting down your favourite product combinations, bath rituals, or Kitchen wishlist. A fun non-cosmetic extra included in the XL subscription box.

name: Incantation shower gel
description: A bewitching shower gel crafted for Halloween, wrapping you in dark, mysterious, and enchanting scents to cast a spell on your shower routine.

name: Frog Spell shower gummy
description: A fun, squishy shower gummy in the shape of a frog, lathering up with a magical, enchanting scent to transform your shower into a witch's cauldron.

name: Toil and Trouble body scrub
description: A bubbling, cauldron-inspired body scrub that sloughs away dead skin with a dark, spiced, and magical scent blend worthy of any witch's potion.

name: Wizard bubble bar
description: An adorably sparkly purple-hatted wizard bubble bar with a warm, unique scent of fennel oil, tangerine, and juniperberry — sweet, spicy, fruity, and utterly magical. Crumble under running water for a bubbling, enchanting bath.

name: Burning Rosemary incense
description: Fragrant incense sticks infused with the cleansing, herbaceous scent of burning rosemary — perfect for setting a witchy autumnal atmosphere at home.

name: Serpent Potion body butter
description: A rich, indulgent body butter inspired by mystical serpent potions, deeply nourishing skin with a dark, magical, and spiced scent blend.

name: Magic bath bomb
description: A truly enchanting bath bomb with a remarkably potent and long-lasting scent — fans have noted its fragrance is so strong it can perfume nearby objects even weeks later. Drop into your bath and let the magic unfold.
